encounter.location: Portland Behavioral Health Associates, 1520 NW 18th Ave, Suite 304, Portland, OR 97209

screening.note: self-reported by patient during telephone call

conditions.name: alcohol use disorder, moderate, in sustained remission

medications.name: lamotrigine 200 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 200 mg by mouth once daily

medications.name: quetiapine 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 50 mg by mouth at bedtime

medications.name: naltrexone 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 50 mg by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Documents pre-move care transition planning for patient relocating from Portland to Seattle. Covers mood stability assessment (PHQ-9 score 5, mild), medication reconciliation and confirmation of lamotrigine 200 mg daily, quetiapine 50 mg nightly, and naltrexone 50 mg daily. Details 90-day bridge prescriptions for lamotrigine and quetiapine, provision of recommended Seattle-area psychiatrist list, plan for comprehensive psychiatric summary and records transfer, and conclusion of active psychiatric care at Portland Behavioral Health Associates.
